result.reason: The MSSqlDatabaseConnector defaults to TrustServerCertificate = true, bypassing certificate validation and posing a security risk. This needs to be configurable by the user or validated by default.
result.approach: Introduce a UI option in SqlServerPage to allow users to configure TrustServerCertificate, update MSSqlDatabaseConnector to respect this setting, and implement proper certificate validation. Add new tests for this functionality.
